name: Subcontract from PDF template — MEP scope
description: Generate a subcontract using a firm's standard template provided as a PDF (not .docx). Tests the skill's ability to parse template structure from PDF and produce a matching Word document.

inputs.user_prompt: Write a subcontract for Division 23 - HVAC using our template (it's a PDF). Subcontractor is ComfortAir Mechanical. Contract value is $1,250,000.

expected_behavior: Reads PDF template using pdfplumber (or vision fallback if scanned)
Identifies article structure from the PDF template
Reconstructs the template structure in the output .docx
Queries Division 23 spec sections from project manual
Generates scope-specific language for HVAC trade
Includes TAB (Testing, Adjusting, Balancing) in special conditions if found in specs
Outputs a valid .docx that reflects the PDF template's structure
ground_truth_notes: PM compared output .docx against PDF template structure and project specifications for Division 23.

template_parsing.description: Article structure from PDF template correctly identified and reproduced

scope_references.description: Division 23 spec sections correctly identified and referenced

trade_specifics.description: HVAC-specific requirements included (TAB, commissioning, refrigerant handling, equipment startup)

fill_in_accuracy.description: Subcontractor name and contract value correctly populated
